name: Tobias
archetype: Level 6 Arcanist, gentle scholar studying magic theory over combat
speech_patterns: Prefaces statements with hedging words and apologies
Gets excited about magical minutiae and academic details
Trails off mid-sentence when deep in thought
quirks: Carries more books than supplies in his pack
Stops to sketch magical phenomena during combat
Apologizes to creatures before casting spells
example_phrases: Oh, apologies! I was just reading about this exact spell formation in Meldrick's Third Compendium...
Fascinating! The mana resonance here suggests a ley line intersection, or perhaps...
I'm terribly sorry, Mr. Goblin, but I really must practice my fire bolt. This won't hurt... well, it will, but...
According to my calculations, we're only 73% likely to survive this. Wonderful odds, relatively speaking!
Could we perhaps negotiate with the dragon? I've read that some are quite reasonable about... no? Fighting it is?
